title: Commanders Vision X Villager Recruits Addon
description: Adds customizable glow effects to your Villager Recruits army.
body:
A client-side addon for Villager Recruits that makes managing your army a lot easier!

**Important: You MUST have the Villager Recruits mod installed (version 1.15.0 or newer) for this addon to work! If you don't have Recruits installed, your game will crash on startup!**

Compatibility: Because this addon is purely client-side, it does not change any server-side code. This means it will not conflict with other mods and is completely safe to use in any modpack.

**Features:**
- Press "H" to toggle a glow effect around nearby recruits. They will glow in different colors based on their class:
  - Green = Own Infantry
  - Cyan = Own Ranged Units (Bowmen/Crossbowmen)
  - Lime = Own Cavalry (Horsemen)
  - Blue = Allied
  - Red = Hostile
  - Yellow = Neutral
- Press "R" on a recruit and select groups in the command menu. The selected recruits will glow White!
- "H" acts as the master switch: If H is off, nothing glows.
- Fully customizable Config file (commandersvision-client.toml) to change colors and range.
**Curseforge:** https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/commanders-vision-x-villager-recruits-addon
